reasoning: The Lean signature matches the informal statement precisely. `IsLocalRing R/S` + `IsNoetherianRing R/S` + `Algebra R S` capture the local Noetherian R-algebra hypothesis. The hypothesis `Ideal.map (algebraMap R S) (maximalIdeal R) ≤ maximalIdeal S` is exactly 𝔓S ⊆ 𝔔. `Module.Finite S M` with `IsScalarTower R S M` captures "M is a finitely generated S-module". The conclusion `Module.Flat R M` matches "M is flat as R-module". Finally, the hypothesis `Module.Flat (R ⧸ 𝔓^n) ((R ⧸ 𝔓^n) ⊗[R] M)` is equivalent to "M/𝔓^n M is flat as R/𝔓^n-module" via Mathlib's `quotTensorEquivQuotSMul : (R ⧸ I) ⊗[R] M ≃ M ⧸ (I • ⊤)`, which is an R/I-linear isomorphism, and flatness is invariant under such isomorphisms. All quantifiers, types, and logical structure match.
